Dear Members of the Press,

Re: Invitation to the Special Citizens’ Press Conference on 21st August 2019

The Special Citizens’ Press Conference will cover the topic of “Hong Kong’s Humanitarian Hellfire: the Outcry of the “Water” amid Police Brutality and Moral Corruption”. There will be an additional session at the end especially for foreign and international journalists to obtain more information. Our team would like to take this opportunity to provide more perspectives into understanding recent events, so as to unveil the truth untold and counteract the misleading information provided by the Hong Kong Police Force and the Hong Kong SAR Government. We hereby cordially invite your organisation to attend our press conference with details as follows:

Date: 21st August, 2019
Time: 14:00


Yours sincerely,

Mr. Kim
On behalf of CPC
